prestazioni: Hybrid turbocharger upgrade for the **EA888 Gen3 2.0 TSI (CUPRA variant, engine code **DKZA**) with a **Garrett GTX3071R Gen II** (84mm compressor, 56mm turbine, 0.83 A/R turbine housing) paired with a **custom 3-inch downpipe** (T304 stainless steel, 200-cell catalytic converter delete) and **APR Stage 2+ ECU/TCU flash** (320+ HP, 420+ Nm, 98 RON fuel map)

Full **034 Motorsport Stage 2 High-Pressure Fuel System** (upgraded **Bosch 044 fuel pump**, **Injector Dynamics ID1050x** injectors, **AEM X-Series Wideband AFR Gauge** for real-time lambda monitoring) with **custom ethanol flex-fuel kit** (E85-compatible, **Continental ethanol sensor**)

Suspension overhaul with **Bilstein B16 PSS10 coilovers** (30-way adjustable damping, **CUPRA-specific spring rates**: 8kg/mm front, 9kg/mm rear) paired with **034 Motorsport Front/Rear Sway Bars** (25mm front, 22mm rear, adjustable end links) and **SuperPro poly bushings** (full subframe, control arms, and differential mounts)
estetica: **Rieger Tuning CUPRA Ateca Widebody Kit** (front/rear fenders, side skirts, and rear diffuser in **carbon fiber**, +60mm track width) with **custom 3M Matte Graphite Wrap** (satin finish, **OEM+ color-matched accents**)

**Akrapović Titanium/Carbon Fiber Rear Diffuser** (dual-exit design, **laser-cut T304 stainless steel tips**) paired with **Seibon Carbon Fiber Hood** (vented, **OEM-style latches**, weight reduction: -8kg)

**OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT Wheels** (19x9.5 ET35 front, 19x10.5 ET38 rear, **5x112 PCD**, **235/35/19 and 265/30/19 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires**) with **H&R TRAK+ Wheel Spacers** (15mm front, 20mm rear, **hub-centric**)
